title: Infinite Kaleidoscope [bbce]
description: Fabric 1.20.1 modpack centered around the Infinite Dimensions Mod, for the Beep Boop Central Minecraft Server
body:
A fabric 1.20.1 modpack centered around the Infinite Dimensions Mod, for the Beep Boop Central Minecraft Server. 

The Infinite Dimensions Mod, based on an april fool's snapshot, remixes Minecraft's generation, blocks, and mobs to create a (nearly) infinte array of dimensions to explore. Throw a signed book into a nether portal to turn it into an infinity portal to the corresponding dimension. This pack has several mods added to increase the range of possibilities and things to accomplish, like Create and El & L's dyes.

Volume warning: Crash Pipe plays a loud sound when you crash, disable it if you don't want that.

---

### Modlist:

#### Main Content Mods:

 - applied energistics 2
 - blahaj (fabric) - replushed
 - create fabric
 - create: estrogen
 - create: steam ‘n’ rails
 - el & l’s dyes
 - grappelling hook mod: restiched
 - infinite dimensions
 - origins
 - scarves
 - traveller’s backpack
